{{nihongo|'''Morooka‑Hiko Shrine (Higashi Komuro, Shiga Town)'''|諸岡比古神社（志賀町東小室）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Morooka‑Hiko Shrine (Higashi Komuro, Shiga Town)'''|諸岡比古神社（志賀町東小室）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Morooka‑Hiko Shrine (Higashi Komuro, Shiga Town)'''|諸岡比古神社（志賀町東小室）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Morooka‑Hiko Shrine (Higashi Komuro, Shiga Town)'''|諸岡比古神社（志賀町東小室）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Morooka‑Hiko Shrine (Higashi Komuro, Shiga Town)'''|諸岡比古神社（志賀町東小室）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].
